overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in dark robes walking through a medieval castle environment. The character moves from a narrow stone passage through an archway into a misty open courtyard with other students, passing various NPCs and approaching a central fountain.

tall grey stone wall covered in patches of green ivy

purple flowering plants along the cobblestone edges
tall slender tree with white bark and green leaves

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path enclosed by stone walls and lush vegetation. White and purple flowers line the walkway as the character approaches a large stone archway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle courtyard with mountain backdrop

character briefly adjusts path to pass an NPC in red robes coming through the archway

agents.ego_description: exiting the stone archway into the open courtyard, navigating around an oncoming student

gothic stone towers and spires of the castle complex
expansive grassy area in the center of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the archway into a vast open courtyard with misty mountains in the background. A student in red robes passes by as the character enters the open space, with castle towers visible to the left and a green lawn ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central courtyard with scattered students and seating areas

events.description: character slows and turns to observe an NPC in red robes running and gesturing energetically

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard while observing other students, slowing to watch a running NPC on the right

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the bustling courtyard, passing by a student running on the grass and others sitting on a stone wall. The camera turns to observe the activity while continuing toward a distant fountain, with castle architecture prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden path leading to central fountain

events.description: character enters the formal garden area with symmetrical hedges approaching the central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone path toward the central fountain, passing other students in dark robes

entered.detail: large ornate stone fountain with multiple tiers in the courtyard center
manicured green boxwood hedges lining the path
manicured green boxwood hedges lining the path
large stone planters with purple flowers

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the central fountain along a formal path lined with trimmed hedges and stone planters. Other students are visible near the fountain as the character moves into the more structured garden area at the courtyard's center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, floral stone passage into a bustling, open-air castle courtyard. It begins along a narrow cobblestone path enclosed by stone walls and lush white and purple flowers, moving steadily toward a large stone archway. As the character emerges from the arch, the scene expands into a vast courtyard where the lighting softens against a backdrop of misty mountains and towering castle spires. The camera then glides through the lively space, passing students running across the green lawn and resting on stone walls, before turning toward the center of the grounds. Finally, the path shifts into a structured garden area with trimmed hedges and stone planters as the character approaches a central fountain surrounded by other students.
